description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and dark panel exterior walls. The property features a fenced yard with a large tree supporting a circular treehouse, as well as an outdoor patio area with a table and chairs. The house has large windows, some arranged in pairs and others as single panes, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is sheltered by a wide overhang, and there is a visible garage on one side of the building. Landscaping includes green lawns and several bushes or small trees, adding to the suburban feel. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brick and dark panel exterior, large windows, a fenced yard, and a treehouse. Features include a garage, patio, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, treehouse, and patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, upper floor windows, and the patio area with table and chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, overhanging roof, and a clear view of the backyard and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the treehouse, side windows, and the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and paired windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide overhang, single door, and minimalistic modern styling
